work_unit: WX-SILENT-01 空 catch 静默吞错 → console.warn 留诊断痕迹 (audit-2026-07-05-016 derived fix #6 of 7)
situation: audit-2026-07-05-016 finding WX-SILENT-01 [LOW]: routes.js + social-scraper.js 多处空 catch(e){}/catch{} 静默吞错 — augmentGridWithCities 失败时 contour 用未增强 grid 分数、weibo mid 采样失败、xhs DOM 抽取失败, 均无任何日志 → 抓取/增强静默失效时运维无信号. 非安全问题, 可观测性债务. 前 5 fix (WX-AUTH-01 eb00793 / WX-HEALTH-01 d4960bd / WX-ENV-01 c0c13b4 / WX-TIMEOUT-01 3a63b2b / WX-CACHE-01 75603a7) 已 stacked on opt-security-1783235416. 注意: WX-CACHE-01 (case-149) 重构 routes.js 时已为 /contour 非流路由的 augmentGrid silent catch 加了 console.warn (routes.js:159), 故本 fix 仅需补 /contour/stream 路由 (routes.js:242) + social-scraper.js 两处.

next_suggestion: 派生 WX-XHS-REUSE-01 [LOW] (social-scraper.js:24-45 浏览器单例 + closeBrowser 竞态: cron 22:00 finally closeBrowser 关 context 时若 HTTP /api/social/fetch 正用同 context → in-flight page.goto 抛 'Target closed'; remediation: closeBrowser 加引用计数或在用时不关, 或 HTTP 用独立 context; --no-sandbox 若确认非 root 可保留加注释). 该 fix 派完后 audit-2026-07-05-016 全 7 findings merged|rejected → audit-cycle-state.status=cycle-complete → 下轮触发新全量审计 (届时工作区未深审的真实代码项目可能需重新扫描, 或对已审项目 module 级续审).

audit_findings.finding: WX-SILENT-01: /contour/stream 路由 augmentGridWithCities try/catch(e){} 空体静默吞错 — getPredictions() 或 augment 失败时 contour 用未增强 grid 分数, 运维无信号. (注: /contour 非流路由同模式已由 WX-CACHE-01 case-149 补 console.warn, 本处 stream 路由漏网.)
audit_findings.remediation: catch(e){console.warn('[contour/stream] augmentGridWithCities failed:', e.message)} — 保留降级语义仅补日志. Applied in this commit (c2a4a5e).

audit_findings.finding: WX-SILENT-01: fetchWeiboDesktop mid→engagement 采样 catch{} /* skip */ 静默吞错 — m.weibo.cn/api/statuses/show 调用失败 (网络/限流/JSON 解析) 时无日志, social_score 可能偏低无诊断.
audit_findings.remediation: catch(e){console.warn(`[weibo] ${cityName}: engagement sample mid=${mid} failed: ${e.message}`)} — 保留跳过语义仅补日志. Applied in this commit (c2a4a5e).

audit_findings.finding: WX-SILENT-01: fetchXiaohongshu DOM 回退抽取 catch{} /* DOM extraction also failed */ 静默吞错 — API intercept 失败后 DOM 抽取再失败时无日志, xhs 数据全空无诊断.
audit_findings.remediation: catch(e){console.warn(`[xhs] ${cityName}: DOM extraction failed: ${e.message}`)} — 保留返回空语义仅补日志. Applied in this commit (c2a4a5e).
